package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringsBuilderStringLen() string {
    ruleID := "strings_builder_string_len"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "`len(builder.String())` instead of `builder.Len()`."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
